text:
Created attachment 255743
Screenshot manual change in chromium

(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #27)

Thank you. Right now it's not served yet. I checked the source in the browser as described (in chromium) and the change isn't in there (also clearing the cache). If I change it manually, it starts to work. I added a screenshot to show you how it works in the browser.

Might be best to wait a few days and see if it somehow makes it into production?!
